moments.title: The Open Championship Tees Off
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship begins this Thursday at Royal Birkdale Golf Club in Southport, England, running until Sunday.

angles.name: General Excitement
angles.copy: Golf's oldest major is back! The 154th Open Championship begins this Thursday at the iconic Royal Birkdale. Who are you backing for the Claret Jug?

angles.name: UK Host City Angle
angles.copy: All eyes on Southport! Royal Birkdale hosts The Open Championship from Thursday. Ready for some world-class golf on home soil?

moments.title: The Hundred Returns
moments.blurb: The Hundred 2026 season kicks off on Tuesday, July 21st, with a double-header at the Kia Oval, featuring MI London vs Sunrisers Leeds.

angles.name: General Kick-off
angles.copy: Get ready for 100-ball action! The Hundred 2026 bursts into life next Tuesday with a double-header. Who are you supporting this season?

angles.name: Welsh Fire Angle
angles.copy: The Welsh Fire are back! The Hundred 2026 starts next week, with our team in action against Southern Brave on Wednesday. Time to bring the heat!

moments.title: Latitude Festival Celebrates 20 Years
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival returns to Henham Park, Suffolk, from July 23-26, 2026, celebrating its 20th year with headliners David Byrne, Teddy Swims, and Lewis Capaldi.

angles.name: General Festival Buzz
angles.copy: Latitude Festival is almost here! Celebrating 20 years of music, arts, and good vibes at Henham Park from July 23rd. Who are you excited to see?

angles.name: Headliner Focus
angles.copy: David Byrne, Teddy Swims, Lewis Capaldi – what a lineup! Latitude Festival kicks off next Thursday. Get ready for an unforgettable weekend in Suffolk.

moments.title: WOMAD Festival Begins
moments.blurb: The World of Music, Arts and Dance (WOMAD) Festival returns to Neston Park, Wiltshire, from July 23-26, 2026, celebrating global culture.

angles.name: Global Culture Celebration
angles.copy: WOMAD Festival is almost here! From Thursday, Neston Park transforms into a global village of music, dance, and art. Discover something new!

moments.title: Glasgow Commonwealth Games Start
moments.blurb: The Commonwealth Games 2026 officially begin in Glasgow, Scotland, on Thursday, July 23rd, running until August 2nd.

angles.name: General Excitement
angles.copy: The Commonwealth Games are coming home! Glasgow kicks off the 2026 Games this Thursday. Get ready for incredible sporting moments!

angles.name: Scottish Pride
angles.copy: Glasgow's ready! The Commonwealth Games 2026 begin this Thursday in Scotland. Who are you cheering on for Team Scotland?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Leon Bridges
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning soul singer Leon Bridges turns 37 today.

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: Sending big birthday wishes to the incredibly smooth Leon Bridges, turning 37 today! What's your favourite track from the soul sensation?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Deborah Cox
moments.blurb: Canadian R&B and dance music icon Deborah Cox celebrates her 52nd birthday today.

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: Happy 52nd Birthday to the powerhouse vocalist Deborah Cox! Still 'Nobody's Supposed to Be Here' without her incredible talent.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Roger McGuinn
moments.blurb: Roger McGuinn, co-founder of the legendary folk-rock band The Byrds, turns 84 today.

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 84th birthday to the iconic Roger McGuinn of The Byrds! That Rickenbacker jangle is timeless.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Gary LeVox
moments.blurb: Gary LeVox, lead singer of the hugely successful country group Rascal Flatts, celebrates his 56th birthday today.

angles.name: Country Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 56th Birthday to Gary LeVox of Rascal Flatts! What's your favourite country anthem from him?

moments.title: Beat-Herder Festival Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The quirky and eclectic Beat-Herder Festival begins on Thursday, July 16th, in the Ribble Valley, featuring acts like Faithless, Wilkinson, and Groove Armada.

angles.name: Festival Vibe
angles.copy: Beat-Herder Festival is back this Thursday for a wild weekend in the Ribble Valley! Ready for Faithless, Groove Armada and more?

moments.title: Hebridean Celtic Festival
moments.blurb: The Hebridean Celtic Festival takes place in Stornoway, Outer Hebrides, Scotland, from July 15-18, 2026, celebrating traditional and contemporary Celtic music.

angles.name: Scottish Festival
angles.copy: The beautiful Outer Hebrides are calling! The Hebridean Celtic Festival kicks off Wednesday in Stornoway. A true celebration of Scottish culture and music!

moments.title: The New Saints in Champions League Qualifier
moments.blurb: Cymru Premier champions The New Saints play their first leg Champions League qualifier in Azerbaijan tomorrow evening.

angles.name: Welsh Football Pride
angles.copy: Good luck to The New Saints! Our Cymru Premier champions begin their Champions League qualifying campaign in Azerbaijan tomorrow. Bring it home!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Stewart Copeland
moments.blurb: Stewart Copeland, the legendary drummer of The Police, turns 74 this Thursday.

angles.name: Drummer Birthday
angles.copy: Sending a massive happy 74th birthday to the one and only Stewart Copeland of The Police! What's your favourite Police track to drum along to?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Luke Hemmings
moments.blurb: Luke Hemmings, lead singer of 5 Seconds of Summer, celebrates his 30th birthday this Thursday.

angles.name: Pop-Punk Birthday
angles.copy: Big 3-0 for Luke Hemmings this Thursday! Happy Birthday to the 5 Seconds of Summer frontman. What's your favourite 5SOS hit?

moments.title: London Athletics Meet
moments.blurb: The London Athletics Meet, a highlight of the 2026 athletics season, takes place at the London Stadium on Saturday, July 18th.

angles.name: Athletics Event
angles.copy: World-class athletics comes to London this Saturday! The London Stadium hosts the London Athletics Meet. Who are you hoping to see on the track?

moments.title: Splendour Festival in Nottingham
moments.blurb: Splendour Festival, Nottinghamshire's biggest festival, takes place in Wollaton Hall & Deer Park from July 18-19, 2026.

angles.name: Nottingham Festival
angles.copy: Nottingham, get ready! Splendour Festival is this weekend at Wollaton Hall. Two days of great music in a stunning setting!

moments.title: School Summer Holidays Begin
moments.blurb: The main UK school summer holidays are set to begin for many students and families around the week of July 20-23, 2026.

angles.name: Summer Break Excitement
angles.copy: Freedom! School's out for summer for many across the UK this week. What are your plans for the long-awaited break?

angles.name: Family Fun Prep
angles.copy: The summer holidays are almost here! Time to plan those family adventures and make some unforgettable memories.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Carlos Santana
moments.blurb: Legendary guitarist Carlos Santana, known for his unique blend of rock, blues, and Latin music, celebrates his 79th birthday on Monday.

angles.name: Guitar Legend Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the one and only Carlos Santana on Monday! Still making guitars sing like no other. What's your favourite Santana track?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Kim Carnes
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning singer-songwriter Kim Carnes, famous for her hit 'Bette Davis Eyes', turns 81 on Monday.

angles.name: Iconic Voice Birthday
angles.copy: She's got Bette Davis Eyes, and it's her birthday! Happy 81st to the distinctive Kim Carnes on Monday. Still a classic!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Yusuf / Cat Stevens
moments.blurb: Iconic folk-rock singer-songwriter Yusuf Islam, widely known as Cat Stevens, celebrates his 78th birthday on Tuesday.

angles.name: Folk Legend Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 78th birthday to the legendary Yusuf Islam, also known as Cat Stevens, on Tuesday! His music is truly 'Wild World' class.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Damian Marley
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning reggae artist Damian 'Jr. Gong' Marley, Bob Marley's youngest son, turns 48 on Tuesday.

angles.name: Reggae Royalty Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 48th Birthday to reggae royalty, Damian 'Jr. Gong' Marley, on Tuesday! Keeping the legacy alive with his incredible music.
